description: Metadata-only benchmark canaries for representative accepted private diagnostics from workers 534-564 across root, DOM, React, Scheduler, native, and react-test-renderer surfaces; public compatibility and comparable timing remain blocked.

acceptedGate.notes: Worker 534 admits private HostRoot finished-work handoff records before commit consumption while host mutation, public root rendering, effects, refs, hydration, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 535 admits private lane-priority and root scheduling snapshots for sync/default updates while callback scheduling, callback execution, host operations, batching, and compatibility remain blocked.

acceptedGate.command: cargo test -p fast-react-reconciler --all-features use_callback layout_effect context_provider_update_lane && node --test tests/conformance/test/react-hook-dispatcher-guard.test.mjs
acceptedGate.notes: Workers 536, 537, and 538 admit private useCallback, layout-effect destroy/create ordering, and context-provider lane propagation metadata while public hook forwarding, callback execution, effect callbacks, broad context traversal, root switching, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 539 admits private react-test-renderer root-create preflight metadata for accepted HostComponent-with-text input and options while public create(), .root, native addon loading, renderer execution, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 540 admits private toJSON update and unmount host-output rows with stale and row-kind rejection while public toJSON, TestInstance, native execution, serialization, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 541 admits private CJS-development act nested-scope blocker records for nested sync, overlapping async, and pending async scope cases while callback execution, thenable settlement, Scheduler flushing, passive effects, root execution, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 542 admits private public-facade nested host-output update metadata through the fake-DOM root bridge while public root execution, scheduling, browser DOM mutation, hydration, events, refs, and compatibility remain blocked.

Workers 543, 544, and 560 admit private change-event extraction, focus/blur blocker, and nested portal owner-root propagation metadata while listener installation, SyntheticEvents, controlled restore scheduling, public portal bubbling, dispatch, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 545 admits private hydration boundary metadata recognizing accepted resource-map, stylesheet, form event, and reset evidence while hydration replay, root render, resource insertion, form execution, reset commits, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 546 admits private script, modulepreload, and preinitModule resource metadata with opaque dedupe and fake-head order rows while fetching, real DOM insertion, script execution, load/error handlers, resource-map mutation, and compatibility remain blocked.

Workers 547 and 548 admit private controlled restore queue write intent and flush-blocker snapshots while queue flushing, host wrapper invocation, radio lookup, value tracker writes, host value writes, browser mutation, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 549 admits private form-action FormData blocker metadata consuming accepted submit/reset rows while raw form inspection, FormData construction, action invocation, dispatcher calls, reset execution, public exports, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 550 admits private scheduler/unstable_mock frame-budget diagnostics for shouldYield, requestPaint, and yield-log ordering while public Scheduler timing, wall-clock frame intervals, React act draining, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 551 admits opt-in private scheduler/unstable_post_task delay, continuation, fallback, and delay-plus-abort ordering diagnostics while public exports, default node keys, browser postTask execution, timing, and compatibility remain blocked.

acceptedGate.command: cargo test -p fast-react-napi --all-features batch_response_sequence && npm run check --workspace @fast-react/native
acceptedGate.notes: Worker 552 admits private native JSON transport batch response sequence and deterministic error-row diagnostics while addon loading, worker-thread execution, renderer/reconciler execution, public native exports, and compatibility remain blocked.

acceptedGate.command: node --test tests/conformance/test/react-hook-dispatcher-guard.test.mjs && cargo test -p fast-react-reconciler --all-features thenable_ping offscreen_visibility
acceptedGate.notes: Workers 557, 558, and 559 admit private transition-hook dispatcher blockers plus Suspense thenable ping and Offscreen visibility transition metadata while transition scheduling, thenable listeners, retry execution, Offscreen rendering/effects, hydration, and compatibility remain blocked.

Workers 561 and 562 admit private style object diff and dangerousHTML/text reset diagnostics while browser DOM style objects, innerHTML/textContent writes, managed child diffing, hydration, Trusted Types, and compatibility remain blocked.

Worker 564 admits a private React cloneElement child-array freeze canary that records the development known mismatch against React 19.2.6 while public React element compatibility and comparable timing remain blocked.
Public root render, scheduling, commit, update, unmount, browser DOM mutation, and compatibility claims remain blocked despite private root handoff and lane diagnostics.
Public createRoot, hydrateRoot, render, unmount, nested host output, event dispatch, root callbacks, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public DOM event extraction, SyntheticEvent creation, focus/change handling, portal bubbling, listener invocation, hydration replay, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public hydrateRoot, hydration replay, marker parsing, resource/form boundary behavior, recoverable-error callbacks, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public resource hint dispatch, modulepreload/preinit behavior, real resource maps, real head insertion, loading/error state, script execution, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public form submit/requestSubmit, FormData construction, action invocation, host transitions, reset queueing/commit, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public controlled input restore queue writes/flushes, wrapper execution, value tracking, radio lookup, live DOM mutation, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public DOM style object mutation, dangerous HTML writes, text reset, managed child updates, hydration, Trusted Types, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public portal root rendering, portal DOM mutation, portal-container event bubbling, SyntheticEvent propagation, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public react-test-renderer create/update/unmount, root access, refs, options, native bridge execution, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public toJSON, toTree, TestInstance query methods, update/unmount serialization, native bridge execution, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public react-test-renderer act queue draining, nested scope handling, async settlement, Scheduler flushing, passive effects, root execution, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public mock Scheduler timing, frame-budget behavior, flush helpers, expired work draining, paint yielding, React act integration, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public browser postTask scheduling, delay/abort timing, continuation behavior, host task ordering, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public native addon loading, request/response transport, worker-thread execution, renderer scheduling, commit, host output, and native compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public hook forwarding, transition scheduling, deferred values, state updates, callback identity semantics, context propagation, effect lifecycles, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public Suspense, thenable ping listeners, retry queue execution, Offscreen hidden/visible rendering, visibility effects, hydration, host mutation, and compatibility claims remain blocked.
Public React element and cloneElement compatibility claims remain blocked; the cloneElement variadic child array development behavior is tracked as a known mismatch, not performance evidence.

milestones.description: Representative accepted private diagnostics from the 534-564 batch may be tracked as deterministic metadata-only benchmark canaries.
milestones.blockedReason: These rows track deterministic private metadata and blocker diagnostics from accepted worker reports; public compatibility and comparable timing claims remain blocked.

milestones.description: Worker 564 cloneElement child-array freeze evidence stays tracked as a known mismatch and is not admitted as comparable timing evidence.
milestones.blockedReason: The canary records accepted private known-mismatch evidence for Fast React development cloneElement child-array freezing; compatibility and comparable timing claims remain false.

milestones.description: Accepted private queue 534-564 diagnostics cannot be promoted to public benchmark timing evidence until every relevant public gate is green-admitted.
milestones.blockedReason: Public root, DOM, React, Scheduler, native, and react-test-renderer gates still reject compatibility claims, so comparable timing evidence remains blocked.

scenarios.area: reconciler private root finished-work commit handoff canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private HostRoot finished-work handoff records and commit-consumption ordering; host mutation, public root rendering, effects, refs, hydration, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: reconciler private root lane-priority scheduling canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private lane-priority, pending-lane, selected-lane, and no-callback scheduling metadata; public scheduling callbacks, batching, host operations, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react private function component hook/context metadata canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private useCallback update, layout-effect destroy/create ordering, and context lane propagation metadata; public hook forwarding, callback/effect execution, broad context traversal, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

The canary tracks only private root-create preflight metadata and stale canary/options rejection; public create(), .root, native addon loading, renderer execution, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

The canary tracks only private toJSON update and unmount row metadata plus stale and mismatch rejection; public toJSON, TestInstance, native execution, serialization compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-test-renderer private act nested-scope blocker canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private nested act scope blocker ids for nested sync and overlapping async cases; callback execution, thenable settlement, Scheduler flushing, passive effects, root execution, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private facade nested host-output canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private nested fake-DOM host-output update metadata through the root bridge; public root execution, scheduling, browser DOM mutation, hydration, events, refs, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private event and portal metadata canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private input/change extraction, focus/blur capture/bubble blocker, and nested portal owner-root path metadata; listener installation, SyntheticEvents, public portal bubbling, dispatch, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private hydration resource/form boundary canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private hydration boundary references to accepted resource and form metadata; hydration replay, root render, resource insertion, form execution, reset commits, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

The canary tracks only private script/modulepreload/preinitModule dispatcher, dedupe, fake-head order, and resource-map classification metadata; fetching, script execution, real DOM insertion, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private controlled restore queue canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private controlled restore queue write intent and flush-blocker metadata; queue flush execution, wrapper invocation, radio lookup, value tracker writes, browser mutation, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private form action FormData blocker canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private form target, submitter, accepted event/reset metadata, FormData blocker, and action/reset blocker records; real form inspection, action invocation, reset execution, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

The canary tracks only private scheduler/unstable_mock virtual frame-budget, shouldYield, requestPaint, and yield-log ordering metadata; public Scheduler timing, React act draining, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

The canary tracks only opt-in private postTask delay, continuation, fallback, and delay-plus-abort ordering diagnostics; public exports, browser postTask execution, host task timing, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: native private JSON batch response sequence canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private deterministic native JSON request/response ordering and error-row metadata mirrored by the addon-free loader; native addon execution, renderer execution, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

The canary tracks only private transition-hook blocker, Suspense thenable ping, and Offscreen visibility transition metadata; transition scheduling, retry execution, hidden rendering, hydration, host mutation, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react-dom private style/dangerous HTML text reset canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks only private style object diff, dangerousHTML transition, text reset decision, and blocked row metadata; style object mutation, innerHTML/textContent writes, managed child diffing, compatibility, and comparable timing remain blocked.

scenarios.area: react private cloneElement child-array freeze known-mismatch canary
scenarios.blockedReason: The canary tracks accepted private known-mismatch evidence: Fast React freezes variadic cloneElement child arrays in development while React 19.2.6 leaves them mutable; compatibility and comparable timing remain blocked.
